userStories.title: Project Scaffold
acceptanceCriteria: Svelte 5 app initializes and compiles via Vite
Directory structure (src/lib/components, src/lib/state, src/lib/utils) is created
@guardian/iframe-messenger is installed
Vitest is configured for unit testing
userStories.notes: Foundation step. Agents must ensure Svelte 5 Runes are enabled.

userStories.title: Data Extraction & Conversion
acceptanceCriteria: Node script successfully reads src/datahttpsfix.jsonp
storyjs_jsonp_data(...) wrapper is stripped via regex/string manipulation
Valid JSON is parsed and saved to src/lib/data/timeline.json

userStories.title: TypeScript Interfaces & Sanitization
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/types.ts exports TimelineEvent, TimelineEra, and TimelineAsset interfaces
dompurify utility is implemented to sanitize text and headline fields
Data loader module strictly types the parsed JSON
userStories.notes: Crucial for security to prevent XSS from 2014-era HTML embedded in the JSON.

userStories.title: Svelte 5 Runes State Store
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/state/timelineState.svelte.ts is created
Global state class exposes $state(activeIndex) and $state(events)
$derived(currentEvent) correctly returns the active event
next(), prev(), and goTo(index) methods update the state correctly
userStories.notes: Agents must use Svelte 5 $state/$derived syntax, not Svelte 4 stores.

userStories.title: Date Math Utilities
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/utils/dates.ts handles 'YYYY,MM,DD' string to JS Date conversion
Calculates total duration of the timeline
Calculates accurate percentage offsets for any given date within the timeline range
High unit test coverage using Vitest
userStories.notes: Needed for plotting events on the Time Navigation bar.

userStories.title: Media Renderer Component
acceptanceCriteria: Media.svelte accepts a TimelineAsset object
Conditionally renders ,
Implements a UI fallback for broken or missing media links
userStories.notes: Must handle stale 2014 CDN URLs gracefully.

userStories.title: Event Slide Component
acceptanceCriteria: Slide.svelte accepts a TimelineEvent object
Uses CSS Grid to split text content (left) and Media component (right)
Applies Guardian global web fonts and typography styles

userStories.title: Main Slider Track
acceptanceCriteria: Slider.svelte renders an array of events using Slide.svelte
Implements horizontal scrolling with 'scroll-snap-type: x mandatory'
Binds scroll position to timelineState.activeIndex via Intersection Observer
Supports keyboard navigation (left/right arrows)
userStories.notes: Core UX component. Needs smooth native scrolling.

userStories.title: Time Navigation Bar
acceptanceCriteria: TimeNav.svelte renders bottom navigation area
Plots year tick marks across the timeline duration
Renders clickable event markers at correct percentage widths using Date Math utils
Clicking a marker correctly calls timelineState.goTo(index)

userStories.title: App Assembly & Iframe Resizing
acceptanceCriteria: App.svelte composes Slider and TimeNav components
Imports and executes iframeMessenger.enableAutoResize() on component mount
External links are intercepted and opened via iframeMessenger.navigate()
userStories.notes: Integration phase. Ensures Guardian article template compatibility.

userStories.title: CSS Custom Properties & Theming
acceptanceCriteria: Guardian color palette (gold/black) extracted to app.css as CSS variables
Legacy absolute positioning replaced with responsive Flexbox/Grid
Visual design faithfully reproduces the dark theme of the original Interactive
userStories.notes: Final polish to match the original 2014 aesthetic.
